title: Thai Beef Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful Thai-inspired stir fry made with beef and a variety of vegetables. Serve with steamed rice for a delicious and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the snow peas to the skillet and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the fish sauce and stir-fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the beef and vegetable mixture over steamed rice.
Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
